cpu.description: GCP n2d-standard-4 (4 vCPU, 16 GB). RAG stack already running from rag-deploy-blueprint step.

env: Linux host with Docker + Docker Compose plugin. RAG stack is running: ingestor server at http://localhost:8082, rag-server at http://localhost:8081. NGC_API_KEY is set. cwd: ${RAG_REPO_ROOT}/. The docs/ directory contains markdown files (not PDFs). The ingestor REST API accepts file uploads at POST /v1/ingest/files and exposes task status at GET /v1/ingest/tasks/{task_id}.

expects.query: Use the rag-ingest-documents skill to upload the file docs/accuracy-benchmarks.md into a collection called test_collection via the ingestor API at http://localhost:8082. Confirm ingestion completed successfully. The eval runs from inside the repository checkout; use git rev-parse --show-toplevel if you need the absolute path.
checks: The agent's trajectory shows it read the rag-ingest-documents SKILL.md before taking action
The agent's trajectory shows it called the ingestor upload endpoint with docs/accuracy-benchmarks.md and collection name test_collection
The agent's trajectory shows it polled the task status endpoint to confirm ingestion completed
The agent's final response reports the ingestion task ID and final status

expects.query: Add the markdown files from the docs/ folder to my knowledge base and tell me how many were successfully ingested.
checks: The agent's trajectory shows it read the rag-ingest-documents SKILL.md before taking action
The agent's trajectory shows it verified ingestor server health before uploading
The agent's trajectory shows it submitted at least one file from the docs/ directory for ingestion
The agent's trajectory shows it checked ingestion status for submitted tasks
The agent's final response reports how many files were successfully ingested
